Title: ~mission(TargetName) Vanished
Description:
I’ve got people left and right askin’ me if I know what happened to ~mission(TargetName). Now personally, I’d be more than happy to see ‘em gone for good, but for whatever reason they got friends in high places demanding answers.

I can’t spare any of my people to go on a wild goose chase, so I'm looking for the perfect candidate to go over to ~mission(Location|Address) and find out what happened to ~mission(TargetName|Last). You’ll get paid if you find where they are.

10 credits says they got way too high and passed out in a dark corner somewhere.

-Smokey
